message:
fix(fr-command): XGROUP SETID accepts ENTRIESREAD form and uses subcommand-syntax-error wording [bd-frankenredis-019w]

Upstream commands.def declares XGROUP with arity = -2; the
XGROUP SETID recognised forms are:
  XGROUP SETID key groupname id|$ [ENTRIESREAD entries-read]
so argc ∈ {5, 7}.

For invalid shapes (argc ≠ 5/7, or unrecognised options token),
upstream calls addReplySubcommandSyntaxError producing 'unknown
subcommand or wrong number of arguments for SETID. Try XGROUP
HELP.'. The ENTRIESREAD value is parsed via
getLongLongFromObjectOrReply ('value is not an integer or out of
range' for non-numeric).

fr-command strictly required argc == 5 (rejecting valid
ENTRIESREAD form) and emitted 'wrong number of arguments for
xgroup|setid command' for argc != 5.

Switch to argc ∈ {5, 7}; validate the ENTRIESREAD token and
integer value (the entries-read state isn't tracked yet so the
parsed value is currently ignored); emit subcommand-syntax-error
wording for any other argc/token. Update the
xgroup_setid_missing_and_wrongtype_paths test.
